use_codes.desc: A METHOD FOR INDUCING A POST-SURGICAL ANALGESIA SPARING EFFECT BY IMPLANTING AT THE SURGICAL SITE A COLLAGEN SPONGE CONTAINING BUPIVACAINE HCL WHICH PROVIDES LOCAL ANESTHESIA FOR UP TO 24 HOURS FOLLOWING IMPLANTATION

indications.text:
XARACOLL is indicated in adults for placement into the surgical site to produce postsurgical
analgesia for up to 24 hours following open inguinal hernia repair.
Limitations of Use
Safety and effectiveness have not been established in other surgical procedures, including
